loadingScreen.welcome: Welcome to the AI Chat Assistant

themeFont.title: Theme & Font
themeFont.subtitle: Customize app theme and global font size settings

theme.label: Theme
theme.helper: Select the app theme. System will follow your device's light/dark mode.

fontSize.label: Global Font Size
fontSize.helper: Adjust the base font size of all texts in the app, affecting chat messages and interface texts

font.label: Global Font
font.helper: Select a global font for the app, affecting the appearance of all interface texts

customization.title: Interface Customization
customization.subtitle: Customize chat interface, message bubbles and toolbar appearance

topToolbar.secondary: Customize components and layout of top toolbar with drag-n-drop

chatInterface.secondary: Customize chat layout and display options

thinkingProcess.secondary: Customize how AI thinking process is displayed and auto-collapse behavior

messageBubble.secondary: Adjust bubble style and width settings

inputToolbar.secondary: Customize background style and appearance of input toolbar

inputBox.secondary: Customize input box style and layout

devTools.title: Developer Tools
devTools.subtitle: Settings for debugging and performance monitor

performanceMonitor.secondary: Display real-time FPS, scroll events, render time and memory usage in chat view

interaction.title: Interaction
interaction.subtitle: Customize interaction style and notification settings

sendWithEnter.secondary: Press Enter to send quickly, use Shift+Enter for new line

notifications.secondary: Show system notification when AI reply is complete

default-model.title: Model Config
default-model.desc: Manage AI models and API keys

web-search.title: Web Search
web-search.desc: Configure web search and related services

knowledge-settings.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge-settings.desc: Manage KB configs and embedding models

providerSection.title: Model Providers
providerSection.subtitle: Configure multiple model providers. Click to manage settings.

topicNaming.secondary: Configure model and options for auto topic naming

selectorStyle.dialog: Current: Dialog (Click to switch to dropdown)
selectorStyle.dropdown: Current: Dropdown (Click to switch to dialog)

modelSection.title: Topic Naming Model
modelSection.subtitle: Select the AI model used to automatically generate titles for topics

enableSwitch.secondary: Automatically generate a suitable title for a new topic when the conversation starts

promptSection.title: Topic Naming Prompt
promptSection.subtitle: Custom prompt for topic naming. Leave blank for default.
promptSection.placeholder: e.g., Generate a concise title of no more than 5 words for the following conversation...
